module.name: multicolumn
module.description: Lays content out in side-by-side columns. Body = one section per column (split by the section separator); each column is ordinary Markdown.
module.aiSpec:
Lay out content in SIDE-BY-SIDE columns. Use this for general two/three-column layouts (text beside an image, comparisons, etc.); for a labelled 2×2 grid use @matrix and for pricing tiers use @pricing. Block module: split the body with <!-- @ --> — one section per column. Each section is ordinary Markdown (text, lists, images, even other modules). Parameters: • gap — CSS length of the space between columns (default 1.5rem). • align — vertical alignment of the columns: flex-start (top), center, flex-end (bottom), stretch (default flex-start). • ratio — list of flex ratios per column, e.g. [1,2,1] for a wider middle column (default [] = equal). • divider — draw a thin vertical rule between columns (true/false, default false). • dividerColor — color of that rule when divider is on (default blank = muted theme line). • pad — CSS padding applied inside each column, e.g. 0.5rem (default blank = none). • wrap — allow columns to wrap onto a new row when narrow (true/false, default false).
<!-- @multicolumn ratio: [1,2,1], gap: 1.5rem, divider: true --> Left <!-- @ --> Center <!-- @ --> Right <!-- @end -->

param.name: gap
param.label: Gap
param.desc: CSS length for the space between columns (e.g. 1.5rem).

param.name: align
param.label: Vertical Alignment
param.desc: How columns align vertically relative to each other.

param.name: ratio
param.label: Column Ratios
param.desc: Flex ratio per column (e.g. [1, 2, 1]); empty = all equal.

param.name: divider
param.label: Column divider
param.desc: Draw a thin vertical rule between columns.

param.name: dividerColor
param.label: Divider color
param.desc: Color of the divider rule; blank uses a muted theme line.

param.name: pad
param.label: Column padding
param.desc: CSS padding inside each column (e.g. 0.5rem); blank = none.

param.name: wrap
param.label: Wrap columns
param.desc: Allow columns to wrap onto a new row when the slide is narrow.

snippet.label: Full-custom multi-column
snippet.text: <!-- @multicolumn ratio: [1,2,1], gap: 1.5rem, align: flex-start, divider: true --> Left <!-- @ --> Center <!-- @ --> Right <!-- @end -->
